race.comment: LELIYN (1) progressed nicely last start in a positive change in tactics when sent forward, only to miss the bob here. Strips fitter and draws well again. Will prove hard to deny. GOLDEN TUNES (4) also resumes and is another that appears to have taken the right steps during her spell. Showed plenty of early dash in her debut campaign and has been readied with two jump-outs. Is drawn to advantage and will inject plenty of speed. IROQUAI (14) returns for the Clarken camp and looks to have progressed nicely during the break and strips fitter for some handy hit-outs in readiness. Expecting a bright return, though may need the run. LITTLE ONE (5) is a Castelvecchio gelding on debut for the O'Connor camp. Is another that has caught the eye in his lead-up work and he draws to get all the favours from the inside alley. No shock to see him make is presence felt.
